nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Stale command-center claims actively misroute planning because agents and plans treat them as authoritative.

nodes.rationale: Extending the existing markdown scanner lets a rename fail the commit that caused broken links.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Reviews without status or delta mechanisms decay into intentions whose divergence is visible only through expensive reconstruction.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: The app can dogfood its proactive thesis by surfacing due hygiene, stale authority, and campaign revisit signals.

nodes.author: Elio

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FAR Execution Checklist/FABLED 2/1 - FABLED 2 — Current Implementation.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A schedule-driven checklist was silently replaced by productive campaign work because no weekly re-draft connected plan and reality.

nodes.author: Elio

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A two-line weekly comparison makes divergence visible immediately instead of reconstructing it a month later.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Mechanically checkable phase gates fit a pain-driven solo project better than false-precision week grids.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Allocating campaign, strategic, and hygiene lanes legitimizes reactive work while preventing strategic or maintenance capacity from reaching zero.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/1 - North Star — The Goal Revisited.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A proactive assistant is defined as a closed operational loop rather than an isolated feature.

nodes.label: Proactive maturity model L0-L5
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/1 - North Star — The Goal Revisited.md
nodes.author: Elio

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/1 - North Star — The Goal Revisited.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: The app composes items-only insights on open, but cannot yet compose and deliver scheduled cross-domain briefings server-side.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/1 - North Star — The Goal Revisited.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Detection and forecasting exist mainly as dashboard widgets rather than server-callable signals.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Each module exposes pure server-callable briefing signals with source, severity, headline, expiry, data, and audience.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/1 - North Star — The Goal Revisited.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A bundled server read lets ERA think without requiring the client to supply household items.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/1 - North Star — The Goal Revisited.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Quiet hours, notification budgets, priority, batching, and channel choice supply judgment to an existing delivery pipe.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/1 - North Star — The Goal Revisited.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Recording seen, acted, dismissed, and wrong outcomes makes proactive behavior learnable and trustworthy.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/1 - North Star — The Goal Revisited.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Hit rate, notification regret, capture time, and speaks-first ratio turn proactivity into measurable behavior.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/2 - Where the App Stands Strong.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Conversational high-frequency actions and structured forms for detailed control avoid both chat ambiguity and form friction.

nodes.label: ERA face-intent-resolver extension seam
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/2 - Where the App Stands Strong.md
nodes.author: Elio

nodes.label: Existing proactive rails
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/2 - Where the App Stands Strong.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Push, cron discipline, bundled RPC reads, offline-first behavior, and undo already supply infrastructure for proactive content.

nodes.label: Dormant intelligence portfolio
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/2 - Where the App Stands Strong.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A substantial part of the planned intelligence layer already exists but remains display-only, under-documented, or under-emitted.

nodes.label: Lebanon-shaped product moat
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/2 - Where the App Stands Strong.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: LBP handling, dual-currency reality, Beirut time, statement import, and physical household NFC address needs global products ignore.

nodes.label: Five-second capture-cost budget
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/3 - Enhancement Map — Sharpen What Exists.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Routine household facts must take under five seconds to record or data-entry abandonment will hollow out every downstream feature.

nodes.label: Unified insights spine
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/3 - Enhancement Map — Sharpen What Exists.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: One insights store unifies fragmented Focus, budget suggestion, and conversation intelligence around source, scope, severity, payload, period, and feedback.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/3 - Enhancement Map — Sharpen What Exists.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A single accept-edit-reject-undo surface with provenance is the trust keystone for automation that proposes before committing.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Existing intelligence should be extracted into pure functions, registered as signals, and assigned channels instead of rebuilt.

nodes.author: Elio

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Mapping frequent actions to Hub, NLP, and inline-confirm coverage makes the primary-interface claim testable.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/3 - Enhancement Map — Sharpen What Exists.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Mixed-currency analytics require date-specific LBP rates because current-rate valuation silently misstates historical periods.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/3 - Enhancement Map — Sharpen What Exists.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Every machine-made change should expose trigger, rule, inputs, undo, and mute controls before automations multiply.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/3 - Enhancement Map — Sharpen What Exists.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A proactive assistant broadcasting wrong money or routing results is worse than no proactive assistant.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: The existing trigger-condition-action mechanism can become the household IFTTT instead of spawning a separate rules engine.

nodes.author: Elio

nodes.label: General household modes engine

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Travel is one reversible household state; guest, sick, crunch, and power-cut modes can reuse pause-adapt-restore semantics after trip cascades are verified.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/4 - Junction Leverage — Compound Advantages.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Rich proactive cards and proposals delivered inside the surface users already open are more actionable and less intrusive than bare push notifications.

nodes.label: Message Actions as universal Act rail
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/4 - Junction Leverage — Compound Advantages.md
nodes.author: Elio

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Signals must decide which household member should hear them, using existing assignment and person identity data.

nodes.label: Offline resilience rail for proactivity
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/4 - Junction Leverage — Compound Advantages.md
nodes.author: Elio

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/4 - Junction Leverage — Compound Advantages.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Groceries provide the lowest-stakes end-to-end proving ground for accept, undo, and provenance semantics.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/4 - Junction Leverage — Compound Advantages.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: An NFC tap supplies identity, location, and moment without geofencing and can dispatch automation events.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Keep deterministic routing for hot intents and use typed tool-calling behind confirmation for the long tail.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Streak and feed structures exist, but partial emission risks teaching users that the app lies.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Briefings cannot claim free time reliably while work and family calendars remain invisible; two-way sync is explicitly fenced off.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/5 - Missed & Forgotten — The Blind Spots.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Bank SMS, receipts, recipe URLs, screenshots, and text can enter ERA as parsed proposals without open-banking support.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/5 - Missed & Forgotten — The Blind Spots.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Existing price observations can reveal item inflation and merchant comparisons without additional capture.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/5 - Missed & Forgotten — The Blind Spots.md
nodes.author: Elio

nodes.label: Conversational affordability simulator
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/5 - Missed & Forgotten — The Blind Spots.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Existing forecast, obligation, and envelope math can answer can-we-afford-it questions as an honest dialogue.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/5 - Missed & Forgotten — The Blind Spots.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A ten-minute Sunday ritual joins money, anomalies, week shape, and meal planning, then emits the briefing schedule.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/6 - Market Lens & Challenge Letter.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Attention is scarce; new alert types should not ship before quiet hours, batching, priority, and a hard daily cap.

nodes.label: One-quarter standalone-module freeze
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/6 - Market Lens & Challenge Letter.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Depth and bridges should receive one quarter because module-building has outpaced compound use of existing junctions.

nodes.label: Personal-first product scope
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/6 - Market Lens & Challenge Letter.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Design quality can target thousands while implementation scope remains explicitly for the actual two-person household.

nodes.label: Bank-SMS, OCR, and statement-import replacement stack
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/6 - Market Lens & Challenge Letter.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Lebanese bank-feed dependencies are outside the project's control, while share-target capture can deliver most of the value.

nodes.label: Feature-driven HubPage decomposition
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/6 - Market Lens & Challenge Letter.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Briefing work should extract thread, composer, and message-list seams so the refactor rides a concrete feature instead of becoming a deferred big bang.

nodes.label: Ship-or-demote wake-word decision
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/6 - Market Lens & Challenge Letter.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Permanent limbo around a flagship voice capability is worse than either completing the small external setup or deliberately parking it.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Stop adding rooms and connect existing sense-reason assets to compose, deliver, approve, and learn capabilities behind trust gates.

nodes.label: Proactive normal-Tuesday definition of done
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/7 - Synthesis — The 90-Day Path.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A concrete day demonstrates policy-gated briefs, anomaly intervention, proposals, NFC triggers, quiet hours, weekly review, provenance, undo, and feedback.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/FABLED 2/1 - FABLED 2 — Current Implementation.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Campaign work produced forecast math, proposal UX, typed notification substrate, and a composed-answer contract, reducing the spine build to assembly.

nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Behavioral trust damage from unpoliced pushes cannot be rolled back as easily as technical code.

nodes.label: Dedicated risk lane for unverified junctions
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Irreversible cascade verification must be scheduled and owned rather than left as a passive precondition.

nodes.label: Test-suite credibility as infrastructure
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A red-but-ignored suite undermines every strategy gate that claims tests must be green.

nodes.label: AI-agent legibility
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/FABLED 2/2 - FABLED 2 — Gaps & Missing.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Dead files, stale authority, and buried decisions create measurable routing and implementation cost for coding agents.

nodes.label: July re-sequenced nervous-system spine
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/FABLED 2/3 - FABLED 2 — Optimization Plan.md
nodes.author: Elio

nodes.author: Elio

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Strategy should explicitly own RPC bodies outside the repo, unverified reversals, behavioral trust, and data that is not being captured.

nodes.label: Metrics plumbing before claims
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/Functional Architecture Review/FABLED 2/4 - FABLED 2 — Future Enhancements.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Every metric must name its concrete measurement path before it can appear in a strategy review.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A decide-by date and default verdict make silence resolve into an explicit decision instead of indefinite debt.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: HubPage grew from 5,506 to 5,798 lines in three weeks while retaining thread, rendering, ERA, voice, shopping, and alert responsibilities.

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Brain, budget, chef, and schedule faces still route through registries, resolvers, formatters, and summary widgets.

nodes.author: Elio

nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Schema-constrained reports over precomputed metrics, tolerant validation, fallback rendering, charts, and persistence provide a composed-answer building block.

nodes.author: Elio

nodes.author: Elio
